body:
P1: Desktop API token enforcement fails open when `OPENCODE_SIDECAR_TOKEN` is unset, allowing `/api/*` requests to bypass the new check in desktop mode.
Prompt for AI agents ```text Check if this issue is valid — if so, understand the root cause and fix it. At web/proxy.ts, line 27: Desktop API token enforcement fails open when `OPENCODE_SIDECAR_TOKEN` is unset, allowing `/api/*` requests to bypass the new check in desktop mode. @@ -21,6 +21,23 @@ export async function proxy(request: NextRequest) { + // Desktop mode: validate sidecar token on API routes + const isDesktop = process.env.DESKTOP_MODE === 'true'; + const sidecarToken = process.env.OPENCODE_SIDECAR_TOKEN; + if (isDesktop && sidecarToken && request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/api/')) { + // Skip token check for routes handled directly by Tauri invoke() + const tauriRoutes = new Set(['/api/health', '/api/providers']); ```
```suggestion if (isDesktop && request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/api/')) { if (!sidecarToken) { return NextResponse.json( { error: 'Server misconfiguration — missing sidecar token' }, { status: 500 }, ); } ```

P1: This async generator returns an empty placeholder generator and never yields recorded audio data.
Prompt for AI agents ```text Check if this issue is valid — if so, understand the root cause and fix it. At web/lib/voice/mistraltranscribe.ts, line 303: This async generator returns an empty placeholder generator and never yields recorded audio data. @@ -69,171 +58,331 @@ export async function transcribeAudio( +): AsyncGenerator { + const chunks: Blob[] = []; + + return new Promise>((resolve) => { + mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (e) => { + if (e.data.size > 0) { ```

P1: Microphone chunks are collected but never sent to the realtime transcription session, so live transcription will not produce text.
Prompt for AI agents ```text Check if this issue is valid — if so, understand the root cause and fix it. At web/lib/voice/mistraltranscribe.ts, line 360: Microphone chunks are collected but never sent to the realtime transcription session, so live transcription will not produce text. @@ -69,171 +58,331 @@ export async function transcribeAudio( + mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = async (event) => { + if (event.data.size > 0) { + const arrayBuffer = await event.data.arrayBuffer(); + const uint8Array = new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer); + // In production, you'd convert to PCM and stream in real-time + // This is a simplified version that collects and transcribes at the end ```

P3: Remove the leading 4-space indentation; it makes the whole Markdown file render as a code block.
Prompt for AI agents ```text Check if this issue is valid — if so, understand the root cause and fix it. At 0web_fetch.md, line 2: Remove the leading 4-space indentation; it makes the whole Markdown file render as a code block. @@ -0,0 +1,28 @@ + + web_search / web_fetch Production Readiness Analysis + + ❌ BROKEN: web.search capability ```
